explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to **text describing exploitation, coercion, or unfair advantage-taking** (such as political corruption, financial manipulation, abusive labor practices, or one party being "taken advantage of" in trade or relationships).

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears across domains including international trade and tariffs (US-China, Taiwan), corporate fraud and litigation (fraudulent billing, franchise exploitation), political scandals (abuse of power for gain), and interpersonal abuse (coercion, assault). It activates on text in multiple languages (English, Spanish, Romanian, Italian, German, Catalan) when they contain this core concept of asymmetric, harmful extraction of value.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: The low-activation texts are generally neutral, truncated, or descriptive statements without a clear narrative of exploitation or coercive harm. They include simple event reports, celebrity lifestyle notes, routine announcements, and incomplete sentences. The key element absent is any framing where one entity is actively and unfairly benefiting at another's expense through pressure, deception, or force.

4. **Closing interpretation**: The neuron detects semantic frames of **predatory or unjust transactional dynamics**, where an agent imposes costs, extracts value, or causes harm to a vulnerable party. It generalizes across languages and specific topics to fire on the concept of leveraged disadvantage.

results.actual_text: A rowdy session consequently ensued. The lawmakers accused Kayamo of trying to dictate their proceedings to them and demanded an apology, but he said he had not said
results.plain_text: The Minister of State for Labour and Employment, Festus Keyamo, on Tuesday, exchanged words with National Assembly members over the federal government’s 774,000 recruitment exercise.  The government had unveiled a scheme, “Special Public Works Programme” to employ 1,000 persons from each of the 774 local government areas.  774,000 jobs: Keyamo dares NASS, says only Buhari can stop recruitment process Keyamo drops threat to resign over FG’s new job scheme The initiative is billed to begin on October 1 and each beneficiary will be paid N20, 000 monthly to carry out public works.  The programme is domiciled in the National Directorate of Employment.  The National Assembly joint Committees on Labour had invited Keyamo to brief them on the recruitment exercise.  Keyamo told the lawmakers that a 20-man selection committee had been constituted in each state of the federation.  Trouble started when the lawmakers accused the minister of lopsidedness in the composition of the committee’s membership.  NDE Director-General Nasiru Ladan said he was only aware of the selection of eight members of the selection committee, adding that he had no knowledge of how the minister arrived at the remaining 12 members.  The lawmakers called for an executive session to resolve the difference, but Keyamo disagreed, insisting that everything must happen on camera.  A rowdy session consequently ensued.  The lawmakers accused Kayamo of trying to dictate their proceedings to them and demanded an apology, but he said he had not said anything that warranted an apology.  “He should excuse himself if he does not want to apologize,” a lawmaker shouted.  Keyamo’s refusal to apologise resulted in another round of uproar which lasted about 15 minutes.  “After all that has been said, we asked him to apologise to the committee because we have rules of proceeding here and that we’re all in agreement that if he does not apologise to us, he can excuse himself or we suspend this programme of the Federal Fovernment,” the Senate Committee Chairman on Labour, Employment and Productivity, Senator Godiya Akwashiki, said.  The minister was later walked out of the session; but while addressing reporters outside the venue, Keyamo accused the lawmakers of trying to hijack the programme after reserving 10 – 15 percent slots for them.  “There’s nothing to apologise for because the constitution says expose corruption, and you cannot expose corruption behind the public. What I said is constitutional.  “They said they have powers to expose, you can’t expose behind closed doors,” Keyamo said.  Akwashiki said:”We only want them to tell us how they arrived at the selection of 20 people from each state, but because he has a skeleton in his cupboard, he didn’t want us to go ahead.  “Even the DG of the NDE, who is the accounting officer of the NDE, didn’t know about the 12 people.  “What is he trying to tell people?  “At the end of the day, he (Keyamo) tried to insult the lawmakers as if he’s trying to tell us the procedures of our sitting.”  Later in a statement, Keyamo directed the state coordinators of the programme to proceed with their work “unhindered”, saying “after I left, I understand that the Joint Committees purportedly suspended the work of the selection committees nationwide until they decide how the programme should be run and who should be in those committee.  “My opinion is that it’s tantamount to challenging the powers of Mr President.”

predictions.text: The minister was later walked out of the session; but while addressing reporters outside the venue, Keyamo accused the lawmakers of trying to hijack the programme after reserving 10 – 15 percent slots for them.  “There’s nothing to apologise for because the constitution says expose corruption, and you cannot expose corruption behind the public. What I said is constitutional.
predictions.reasoning: This section directly accuses lawmakers of reserving slots for themselves, indicating unfair advantage-taking and corruption.

predictions.text: Trouble started when the lawmakers accused the minister of lopsidedness in the composition of the committee’s membership.  NDE Director-General Nasiru Ladan said he was only aware of the selection of eight members of the selection committee, adding that he had no knowledge of how the minister arrived at the remaining 12 members.
predictions.reasoning: This section describes accusations of biased committee composition and lack of transparency, suggesting potential corruption.

predictions.text: Akwashiki said:”We only want them to tell us how they arrived at the selection of 20 people from each state, but because he has a skeleton in his cupboard, he didn’t want us to go ahead.  “Even the DG of the NDE, who is the accounting officer of the NDE, didn’t know about the 12 people.
predictions.reasoning: The lawmaker implies the minister has something to hide, pointing to possible corrupt practices.

results.actual_text: 17 storming of the Parliament. The Zaev regime used the trial to blackmail three members of Parliament, who were also charged, to vote in favor of the
results.plain_text: VMRO-DPMNE leader Hristijan Mickoski will have a rare meeting with President Stevo Pendarovski today, to discuss the case of the political prisoners from the April 27th trial.  Pendarovski agreed with Mickoski that the defendants are sentenced under unreasonable charges – of terrorism. The meeting comes ten days after a major protest in downtown Skopje, supported by VMRO-DPMNE, which demands a new trial in the case and realistic charges for the defendants.   We do not ask for mercy. We ask that they are charged for what they did, not for what they didn’t do, the opposition party said in a press release. Sixteen protesters and Interior Ministry officials were sentenced over the 2017 storming of the Parliament. The Zaev regime used the trial to blackmail three members of Parliament, who were also charged, to vote in favor of the imposed name change. The members of Parliament were pardoned, but the mere protesters remain in prison, with long sentences.

predictions.text: Sixteen protesters and Interior Ministry officials were sentenced over the 2017 storming of the Parliament. The Zaev regime used the trial to blackmail three members of Parliament, who were also charged, to vote in favor of the imposed name change. The members of Parliament were pardoned, but the mere protesters remain in prison, with long sentences.
predictions.reasoning: This section explicitly describes the regime using a trial to blackmail MPs, a clear case of coercion for political gain.

Pendarovski agreed with Mickoski that the defendants are sentenced under unreasonable charges – of terrorism.

results.actual_text: January 11, 2020 Entre los alimentos que estarán cobijados se encuentran: alimentos enlatados y frescos, agua,
results.plain_text: DACO congela los precios de los artículos de primera necesidad tras la emergencia Además, la gobernadora anunció que firmó una declaración de emergencia de desastre mayor tras estimados preliminares de daños que sobrepasan los $110 millones. Nota de archivo: esta historia fue publicada hace más de 2 años. PUBLICIDAD El Departamento de Asuntos del Consumidor (DACO) emitió hoy una orden para la congelar los precios de los artículos de primera necesidad ante la situación de emergencia sísmica que enfrenta Puerto Rico. Así lo anunció esta tarde la gobernadora Wanda Vázquez Garced en una conferencia de prensa desde el Negociado de Manejo de Emergencia y Administración de Desastre (Nmead) junto a secretarios de agencias gubernamentales y expertos. La secretaria de DACO, Carmen Salgado, expidió la orden para “proteger a los consumidores de alza especulativa e injustificada en los precios de los productos de primera necesidad”, reza el documento.  El DACO emite orden a beneficio del consumidor. Ordena la congelación de precios en artículos de primera necesidad, la congelación del precio del gas y la congelación del margen de ganancia de la gasolina y el diésel. @fortalezapr @wandavazquezg @carmensalgado pic.twitter.com/FLz1JUQiAM — DACO (@dacoatufavor) January 11, 2020 Entre los alimentos que estarán cobijados se encuentran: alimentos enlatados y frescos, agua, hielo, leche, fórmula de leche para bebés, café, todo tipo de farináceos y granos, y barras nutritivas. Asimismo, medicamentos y artículos de primeros auxilios, mochilas, bultos, todo tipo de “kit” de preparación de emergencias y cualquier otro artículo o servicio que sea necesario para preparar una mochila de emergencia. También incluye: tornillos, tuercas, clavos, expansiones, paneles de madera, soga, tensores, herramientas, plantas eléctricas de gasolina, diésel o de gas propano, piezas, así como servicios de mantenimiento y preparación e instalación. Por otro lado, la gobernadora anunció que firmó una declaración de emergencia de desastre mayor tras estimados preliminares de daños que sobrepasan los $110 millones. Desde el pasado 28 de diciembre, Puerto Rico se ha visto afectado por una actividad sísmica persistente en la zona sur del archipiélago borincano. Esta mañana, un terremoto de 5.99 volvió a estremecer al País. Miles de residencias y estructuras han sufrido daños. Anoche, el número de refugiados ascendía a 4,184 personas. Miles de personas en el sur han decidido abandonar sus hogares y pernoctar al aire libre por temor a que sus residencias colapsen.

predictions.text: La secretaria de DACO, Carmen Salgado, expidió la orden para “proteger a los consumidores de alza especulativa e injustificada en los precios de los productos de primera necesidad”, reza el documento. El DACO emite orden a beneficio del consumidor. Ordena la congelación de precios en artículos de primera necesidad, la congelación del precio del gas y la congelación del margen de ganancia de la gasolina y el diésel.
predictions.reasoning: This section directly mentions protecting consumers from speculative and unjustified price increases, which is a form of exploitation during emergencies.

results.actual_text: Outhmane Diagne et Ibra Gueye alias Papito Kara,
results.plain_text: Outhmane Diagne et Ibra Gueye alias Papito Kara, sont libres. Ils ont été placés sous contrôle judiciaire. « Le juge Mamadou Seck du 2ème cabinet vient de signer la mainlevée des mandats de dépôt d’Ibra Gueye Papito Kara et Outhmane Diagne, placés sous contrôle judiciaire allégé (émargement seulement), a informé Me Cheikh Khoureychi Ba.  Les deux mises en cause étaient poursuivies pour diffusion de fausses nouvelles, effacement, modification, fabrication et introduction de données informatiques.

results.actual_text: Stromboli – Trabocco lavico nell’area craterica Nord dello
results.plain_text: Stromboli – Trabocco lavico nell’area craterica Nord dello Stromboli a partire dalle ore 9.51.  Il fenomeno è stato osservato dalle telecamere dell’Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia. Il fronte del flusso lavico si attesta sulla parte alta della Sciara del fuoco. Dal punto di vista sismico, dalle 09.31 circa è stato osservato un moderato incremento nell’ampiezza media del tremore vulcanico, all’interno della fascia dei valori medi. Non si segnalano variazioni significative nel tasso di occorrenza e nell’ampiezza degli explosion quakes.  I segnali delle stazioni GNSS e clinometriche non mostrano variazioni significative.

predictions.reasoning: This section describes a lava flow observed by cameras, with no relation to exploitation or coercion.
